rulings.Case Title: EICON INC VS WORLDPOINT INTERACTIVE INC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration And Correction Of Nov 20, 2008, Order Denying Motion To Dismiss For Falure To Timely Serve Summons
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 29, 2008, line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT MASSIMO FUCHS' Motion For Reconsideration And Correction Of November 20, 2008, Order Denying Motion To Dismiss For Falure To Timely Serve Summons is denied. There is no basis to reconsider the Court's prior ruling. The order accurately reflects the Court's ruling. The issue of appellate costs is unrelated to the motion to dismiss. The request for sanctions is denied. CCP section 128.7 must be followed before sanctions may be imposed. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: MUSEUM PARC RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS'
rulings.Calendar Matter: (Amended) Notice Of Motion Of Petitioner'S Petition For Appointment Of A Receiver; Ccp 564(1)
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 29, 2008, line 14. PETITIONER MUSEUM PARC RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS' (Amended) Petition For Appointment Of A Receiver. A hearing is required. The parties are to address whether this case should be singly assigned. The Court requires clarification on (1) the amount of taxes owed; (2) the terms of the 1st bank note and the status of any refinancing; (3) the status of the payment plan; (4) the need for security and how the receiver would obtain security. =(302/PJM/VC)
